Name: Financial ITC Qualification Hybrid

Caption.String: When Depreciation Driven is selected, controls for setting the ITC basis are set on the Depreciation page
The ITC basis is determined by a calculation this is:

System subcomponents may not be represented on this page depending on technology. The percentage of overall costs attributed to each system subcomponent can be determine on the Installation Costs page
